task_description: Create a desktop GUI application for CloudVault with a cloud icon, purple (#8B5CF6) and jet black (#0a0a0a) color scheme, full versatility (all functionality accessible from the GUI), and system tray integration. Built with Python + CustomTkinter, targeting Windows.

verification.summary: All 15 Python files pass AST syntax validation. Full GUI application structure created with 18 files including app.py entry point, 6 views, core modules, system tray, icon generator, build script, and documentation. Network constraints prevent runtime testing but code structure and syntax are validated.
